name: smartsheet
description: Query YOUR OWN Smartsheet account from Claude — and optionally edit rows. You paste your personal Smartsheet token once; every action is scoped to what your Smartsheet account can see — nobody else's. Powered by a Cornell-hosted n8n webhook.
long_description: A thin Cowork/MCP front-end over the Cornell n8n "Smartsheet (per-user)" webhook. Each tool sends your OWN Smartsheet Personal Access Token (PAT) to the webhook in the X-Smartsheet-Token header; the webhook does the Smartsheet REST v2 work scoped to that token's account. There is no shared service account — your PAT is your identity and your security boundary, so you only ever access sheets owned by or shared with you. Your token is stored ONLY in this plugin's local config (OS keychain): never bundled, never committed, never sent anywhere but the Cornell n8n webhook over HTTPS. Read tools (always on): smartsheet_whoami, smartsheet_list_sheets, smartsheet_get_sheet, smartsheet_search, smartsheet_list_workspaces. Write tools (opt-in via the 'Allow write actions' toggle): smartsheet_add_rows, smartsheet_update_rows, smartsheet_delete_rows.

smartsheet_webhook_url.title: Smartsheet webhook URL
smartsheet_webhook_url.description: The Cornell n8n webhook for the per-user Smartsheet connector, e.g. https://n8n-dev.lcmain.aaii.cucloud.net/webhook/smartsheet-user

smartsheet_user_pat.title: Your Smartsheet Personal Access Token
smartsheet_user_pat.description: YOUR OWN Smartsheet API token. Generate it in Smartsheet: Account (bottom-left) -> Personal Settings -> API Access -> Generate new access token. This scopes everything to your own Smartsheet account. See ONBOARDING.md for step-by-step.

smartsheet_enable_write.title: Allow write actions (add/update/delete rows)
smartsheet_enable_write.description: OFF by default: only read tools are available. Turn ON to also enable smartsheet_add_rows, smartsheet_update_rows, and smartsheet_delete_rows. Your Smartsheet token's own permissions remain the hard limit — this toggle is an explicit consent gate on top of that.

tools.name: smartsheet_whoami
tools.description: Confirm which Smartsheet account this connector is acting as (your email/name).

tools.name: smartsheet_list_sheets
tools.description: List the sheets your Smartsheet account can access.

tools.name: smartsheet_get_sheet
tools.description: Get one sheet's columns + rows by sheetId.

tools.name: smartsheet_search
tools.description: Search your accessible Smartsheet content for a text query.

tools.name: smartsheet_list_workspaces
tools.description: List the workspaces your Smartsheet account can access.

tools.name: smartsheet_add_rows
tools.description: (Write-enabled only) Append rows to a sheet by sheetId.

tools.name: smartsheet_update_rows
tools.description: (Write-enabled only) Update existing rows on a sheet by sheetId.

tools.name: smartsheet_delete_rows
tools.description: (Write-enabled only) Delete rows from a sheet by sheetId and row ids.
